appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to record that `PackingController` now exposes only `POST /api/v1/factory/packing-records` and that the retired `/api/v1/factory/pack` and `/api/v1/factory/packing-records/{productionLogId}/complete` routes are already removed.

Updated `.factory/library/factory-canonical-flow.md` to remove the already-retired pack routes from the mission delete-first list and replace them with a cleanup reminder for any stale references to retired pack routes or pack-completion semantics.

rejectedObservations.observation: Relax `factory-flow-worker` so delete-only seam removals do not need tests before implementation.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because a single justified deviation does not yet show a systemic skill problem; the current guidance still correctly pushes workers toward tests-first behavior, and local judgment can handle rare symbol-removal cleanups without changing the shared procedure.
